# Cruizn Clean

> Cruizn Clean is a mobile auto detailing service for Yorba Linda and surrounding Orange County cities.

Cruizn Clean provides mobile interior detailing, exterior detailing, paint correction, ceramic protection, and maintenance detailing. The website explains services, pricing starting points, vehicle intake, scheduling, quote requests, and customer support.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.cruiznclean.com/): Overview of Cruizn Clean, service focus, and booking path.
- [Services](https://www.cruiznclean.com/services): Mobile detailing packages, add-ons, vehicle/service selection, and booking entry point.
- [Booking](https://www.cruiznclean.com/booking): Vehicle intake, customer details, Cal.com scheduling, and deposit handoff.
- [Quote](https://www.cruiznclean.com/quote): Quote request path for questions or work that needs review before booking.
- [Gallery](https://www.cruiznclean.com/gallery): Vehicle detail examples and visual proof of work.
- [FAQ](https://www.cruiznclean.com/faq): Booking, service, payment, and process questions.
- [Contact](https://www.cruiznclean.com/contact): Contact options and public support information.

## Services

- Mini Detail
- Maintenance Detail
- Full Interior
- Full Exterior
- Full Reset
- Interior detailing
- Exterior detailing
- Maintenance detailing
- Paint correction
- Ceramic protection/coating
- Add-on detailing services

## Service areas

Cruizn Clean focuses on Yorba Linda and surrounding Orange County cities, including approved service areas listed on the website.

## Booking flow

Customers submit vehicle and service details first, then schedule through Cal.com. Pay Deposit appears after scheduling is confirmed. Secure checkout opens after the booking time is selected and confirmed.

## Contact

Use the website contact and quote pages for current public contact options.
